hero.headline: Uttaranchal University Online MBA in Financial Management: Fees, Syllabus and Career Scope
hero.sub: UGC-DEB approved online MBA with Financial Management specialisation from Uttaranchal University, Dehradun. NAAC A+, WES recognised, est. 2011. Rs 1,40,000 gross, Rs 98,000 net (semester) or Rs 94,000 net (one-time) after 30% Early Bird. No-cost EMI at Rs 3,956/month. Corporate Financial Management, Security Analysis, Wealth Management, and Risk Management in Sem 3-4.

sections.tldr: Uttaranchal University Online MBA Financial Management: NAAC A+, UGC-DEB approved, WES recognised. Rs 94,000 net (one-time) or Rs 98,000 net (semester) after 30% Early Bird on Rs 1,40,000 gross. No-cost EMI at Rs 3,956/month. Sem 3-4 depth in Corporate Financial Management, Security Analysis and Portfolio Management, Wealth Management, and Risk Management. Strong budget option for finance careers, but limited brand recognition outside Uttarakhand compared to flagships.

about.body:
The Uttaranchal University Online MBA in Financial Management is offered by Uttaranchal University (UU), a private university established in 2011 in Dehradun, Uttarakhand. UU holds NAAC A+ accreditation and UGC-DEB approval for its online programmes. The degree is WES recognised for international credential evaluation.

The Financial Management specialisation covers Corporate Financial Management, Security Analysis Portfolio and Risk Management, Wealth Management and Investment Environment, and Risk Management across Semesters 3 and 4. These subjects prepare working professionals for roles in banking, corporate treasury, investment advisory, and financial planning.

At Rs 94,000 net (one-time) or Rs 98,000 net (semester track), this is one of the most affordable NAAC A+ online MBAs with a dedicated finance track. The trade-off is limited brand recognition beyond Uttarakhand and North India compared to universities like Amity, LPU, or Chandigarh University. For cost-conscious professionals who prioritise accreditation over brand premium, UU Financial Management is a practical choice.

sem3Subjects.name: Strategic Management
sem3Subjects.description: Develop competitive strategy frameworks, industry analysis models, and corporate-level strategic planning skills.

sem3Subjects.name: Supply Chain Management
sem3Subjects.description: Study procurement, logistics, inventory management, and end-to-end supply chain coordination.

sem3Subjects.name: Financial Statement Analysis
sem3Subjects.description: Interpret balance sheets, income statements, cash flow statements, and apply ratio analysis for financial decision-making.

sem3Subjects.name: Corporate Financial Management
sem3Subjects.description: Apply capital budgeting, cost of capital estimation, dividend policy, and working capital management in corporate settings.

sem3Subjects.name: Security Analysis Portfolio and Risk Management
sem3Subjects.description: Conduct equity valuation, build investment portfolios using Markowitz theory, and apply risk measurement techniques.

sem4Subjects.name: Entrepreneurship Development
sem4Subjects.description: Study business model creation, startup finance, venture capital, and entrepreneurial risk assessment.

sem4Subjects.name: Corporate Governance
sem4Subjects.description: Examine board structures, regulatory compliance, SEBI guidelines, and ethical governance frameworks.

sem4Subjects.name: Project Work
sem4Subjects.description: Complete an applied research project on a finance topic with data collection, analysis, and presentation.

sem4Subjects.name: Wealth Management and Investment Environment
sem4Subjects.description: Study investment advisory, mutual fund selection, estate planning, and high-net-worth client portfolio management.

sem4Subjects.name: Risk Management
sem4Subjects.description: Identify and quantify financial risk using VaR, credit risk models, stress testing, and enterprise risk frameworks.

syllabus.note: Sem 1-2 cover shared core subjects across all Uttaranchal University Online MBA specialisations. See the main Uttaranchal University Online MBA page for the core subject list.

whoHires.body:
Financial Management MBA graduates target these industries and roles:

**Industries:** Commercial banking, Corporate treasury, Insurance and wealth management, NBFCs and fintech, Financial consulting and accounting firms

**Entry-level roles:** Financial Analyst, Credit Analyst, Investment Research Associate, Treasury Analyst, Accounts Manager

**Mid-level roles (3-5 years):** Finance Manager, Portfolio Manager, Treasury Manager, Credit Manager, Risk Analyst

**Senior roles (7+ years):** CFO, VP Finance, Head of Treasury, Investment Director, Chief Risk Officer

**Typical hiring organisations:** HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, SBI, Axis Bank, Kotak Mahindra Bank, Bajaj Finance, HDFC Life, LIC, Deloitte, KPMG, EY, PwC, Motilal Oswal, IIFL

skills.body:
The Financial Management specialisation builds skills tested by banking and corporate finance employers:

**Technical skills:**
- Corporate Financial Management: capital budgeting, cost of capital, dividend policy, and working capital management for corporate finance roles
- Security Analysis and Portfolio Management: equity valuation, DCF modelling, Markowitz portfolio theory, and risk measurement for investment and advisory roles
- Risk Management: VaR calculation, credit risk modelling, stress testing, and enterprise risk framework design for banking and insurance
- Financial Statement Analysis: ratio analysis, cash flow interpretation, and financial health assessment for credit analysis and audit roles

**Applied skills:**
- Wealth Management: investment advisory, mutual fund selection, estate planning, and high-net-worth portfolio management
- Corporate Governance: SEBI compliance, board-level reporting, and ethical governance frameworks

**Soft skills:** Financial model presentation to senior management, credit proposal drafting, investment recommendation reports, and risk exposure communication to audit committees.

comparisons.body:
Comparing Uttaranchal University Online MBA Financial Management against peers:

**vs IGNOU MBA Finance (Rs 66,000):** IGNOU is the cheapest option with strong government university brand. However, IGNOU lacks a modern LMS and live session infrastructure. UU at Rs 94,000 offers a more structured online learning experience with dedicated finance subjects. For pure credential at minimum cost, IGNOU wins. For a better learning experience at a modest premium, UU is worth considering.

**vs Galgotias Online MBA Finance (Rs 86,400):** Galgotias is NAAC A+ at a similar budget tier with a mandatory Master Thesis component. UU Financial Management offers more dedicated finance subjects (Corporate Financial Management, Wealth Management, Risk Management) compared to Galgotias. Both are NCR/North India focused. Fee difference is minimal.

**vs Amity Online MBA Finance (Rs 2,25,000):** Amity is 2.4x the cost with NIRF #22, larger alumni network, and stronger pan-India brand recognition. If brand recognition and alumni network matter for your career goals, Amity justifies the premium. If accreditation and affordability are the priority, UU delivers NAAC A+ at Rs 94,000.

**vs LPU Online MBA Finance (Rs 1,61,000):** LPU offers NIRF #31, Coursera Plus bundle, zero-cost EMI, and stronger placement support. At 1.7x the cost, LPU offers meaningfully more in terms of brand, rankings, and support infrastructure.

**vs CU Online MBA Finance (Rs 1,65,000):** Chandigarh University is NIRF #19 with PwC co-teaching modules. At 1.75x the cost, CU offers substantially stronger rankings and industry co-teaching.

**vs JIIT Online MBA (Rs 1,82,000):** JIIT offers mandatory internship and AI-integrated core. At nearly 2x the cost, JIIT suits those wanting structured industry exposure.

**vs DPU Online MBA Finance (Rs 1,89,400):** DPU is NIRF #41, NAAC A++. At 2x the cost, DPU offers higher accreditation grade and stronger Pune/Maharashtra brand.

fees.body:
The Uttaranchal University Online MBA in Financial Management has a gross fee of Rs 1,40,000. A 30% Early Bird discount reduces the net fee across all payment tracks.

**Track 1: One-Time Payment**
- Net fee: Rs 94,000 (includes Rs 4,000 additional concession over semester track)
- Single payment at admission

**Track 2: Annual Payment**
- Rs 47,000 x 2 years = Rs 94,000 net
- Same net cost as one-time payment

**Track 3: Semester Payment**
- Rs 24,500 x 4 semesters = Rs 98,000 net
- Costs Rs 4,000 more than one-time or annual tracks

**No-Cost EMI:**
- Rs 3,956/month directly through the university
- No interest charged. No processing fee.

**Included:** Exam fee of Rs 2,500 per semester is included in all quoted figures.
**Not applicable:** No separate application fee. No scholarships beyond the Early Bird discount. No bundled perks.

Fees listed are indicative. EdifyEdu reconfirms fees with Uttaranchal University each quarter. Please reconfirm with our counsellor before any payment.

certificate.body: The degree certificate is issued by Uttaranchal University, Dehradun. It reads 'Master of Business Administration' with the Financial Management specialisation noted on the marksheet and transcript. Online mode is identified per UGC-DEB 2020 regulations. The degree is WES recognised for international credential evaluation. It is valid for corporate hiring, PSU eligibility, and higher education admission across India.

reviews.intro: Three reviews from Uttaranchal University Online MBA Financial Management students. Ratings from post-completion feedback.

items.name: Vikram
items.liked: At Rs 94,000 with the Early Bird, this is genuinely one of the cheapest NAAC A+ finance MBAs available. Corporate Financial Management and Risk Management subjects were well-structured.
items.disliked: Career services are basic. No dedicated placement cell for online students. You need to source opportunities yourself.
items.body: I work in a cooperative bank in Uttarakhand and needed an MBA to move into a management role. UU delivered the credential at a price point that made it a clear choice. The finance subjects covered what I needed. Brand recognition is limited outside the state, but for Uttarakhand and North India banking, the NAAC A+ tag carries weight.

items.name: Sneha
items.liked: The fee advantage is real. Security Analysis and Wealth Management subjects gave me useful frameworks for my role at an NBFC.
items.disliked: The Early Bird window is not always clearly communicated. I almost missed it. Also, brand recognition in Delhi is low compared to Amity or LPU.
items.body: For the price, UU Financial Management is hard to beat on paper. NAAC A+, UGC-DEB approved, and under Rs 1 lakh. But if you are targeting roles at top-tier banks or consulting firms in metro cities, the brand will not carry the same weight as Amity or Chandigarh University. Good for formalising credentials at minimum cost.

items.name: Rajesh
items.liked: No-cost EMI at Rs 3,956/month made it genuinely affordable. Exam fees included in the quoted figure, so no hidden charges.
items.disliked: No bundled perks like Coursera Plus or industry certifications that LPU or CU offer. The programme is bare-bones beyond the core syllabus.
items.body: Solid credential for working professionals in Uttarakhand and Himachal. The Rs 94,000 price with NAAC A+ is the main selling point. Do not expect the brand recognition or career support infrastructure of universities charging Rs 1.5-2 lakh. You get what you pay for, and at this price, you get a credible, accredited MBA.

faqs.question: What is the net fee for Uttaranchal University Online MBA after the Early Bird discount?
faqs.answer: The gross fee is Rs 1,40,000. After the 30% Early Bird discount, the net fee is Rs 94,000 (one-time or annual) or Rs 98,000 (semester track). The semester track costs Rs 4,000 more than one-time or annual payment.

faqs.question: Is the Early Bird discount always available?
faqs.answer: The 30% Early Bird discount is the standard concession offered by Uttaranchal University. There is no separate scholarship programme beyond this discount. Confirm availability and any applicable deadlines with our counsellor before applying.

faqs.question: Are exam fees included in the quoted fee?
faqs.answer: Yes. The exam fee of Rs 2,500 per semester is included in all quoted fee figures. There are no additional exam charges or hidden fees.

faqs.question: Is Uttaranchal University Online MBA valid for government jobs?
faqs.answer: Yes. The programme is UGC-DEB approved, which means the degree is valid for government job applications, PSU recruitment, and higher education admission across India.

faqs.question: How does UU Online MBA compare to IGNOU MBA on fees?
faqs.answer: IGNOU MBA is cheaper at Rs 66,000. UU at Rs 94,000 costs Rs 28,000 more but offers NAAC A+ accreditation, a modern LMS, live sessions, and dedicated finance specialisation subjects. IGNOU has stronger government university brand recognition but less structured online delivery.

chooseIf: You want a NAAC A+, UGC-DEB approved online MBA in Financial Management at under Rs 1 lakh total fee.
You want no-cost EMI at Rs 3,956/month with exam fees included and no hidden charges.
You are a working professional in Uttarakhand or North India who values accreditation over brand premium.
consider: If brand recognition matters for metro banking or BFSI careers, Amity (Rs 2.25L, NIRF #22) or LPU (Rs 1.61L, NIRF #31) carry stronger brand weight.
If you want the absolute cheapest MBA, IGNOU at Rs 66,000 is lower but lacks a modern LMS and live sessions.
If you want industry co-teaching or bundled certifications, CU (Rs 1.65L, PwC modules) or LPU (Rs 1.61L, Coursera Plus) offer more structured add-ons.
